seoTitle: Mullaley vs Mullaway — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mullaley and Mullaway. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mullaley and Mullaway.
heading: Mullaley vs Mullaway — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mullaley, New South Wales and Mullaway, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mullaley has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Mullaway (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mullaley or Mullaway safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mullaley has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Mullaway scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mullaley scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Mullaway scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mullaley or Mullaway?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mullaley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
